LanguageData.PH_RemoteDoorSecuredRemotelyDesc: Prevent pawns from opening this door while the linked button or lever is off.
LanguageData.PH_ButtonNeeded: Requires a linked button or lever.
LanguageData.PH_ButtonConnectDesc: Choose the button or lever that controls this door.
LanguageData.PH_ButtonConnectFailed: That is not a remote door button or lever.
LanguageData.PH_UseButtonOrLeverDesc: Toggle this control and make all linked doors match its state.
LanguageData.PH_BuildButtonDesc: Place a {0} for this door. Once it finishes construction, this door automatically links to it, replacing any current remote link. You can still re-link manually afterwards.
LanguageData.PH_BuildButtonArmed: This door will link to the next {0} you finish building.
LanguageData.PH_RenameButtonDesc: Give this button or lever a custom name so you can tell your remote controls apart.
